headline: PECO Announces Transition of President and CEO David Vahos to Special Advisor to Exelon’s President and CEO
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 21, 2026--Transition of David Vahos to Special Advisor to Exelon’s President and CEO. Mike Innocenzo, Exelon COO Named Interim President and CEO of PECO

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Exelon, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst David Arcaro   maintains Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $56 to $55.

headline: Keybanc Maintains Underweight on Exelon, Lowers Price Target to $43
summary: Keybanc  analyst Eric Heath   maintains Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $44 to $43.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Exelon with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $50
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $50.
